channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: This new bill aims to make presidential meme coins illegal
item.description: California Democrat Rep. Sam Liccardo, a freshman congressman who represents Silicon Valley, said he’s surprised the first piece of legislation he’s sponsoring takes aim at President Donald Trump’s meme coin.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Apple just expanded its child safety features with age ratings that could lessen the chance of an inappropriate download
item.description: Apple's released a new whitepaper on online child safety detailing some new features for Child Accounts and revealing the companys' approach to age verification with a new API and global ratings for apps.
item.dc:creator: jacob.krol@futurenet.com (Jacob Krol), TechRadar

item.title: Network jobs watch: Hiring, skills and certification trends
item.description: Network and infrastructure roles continue to shift as enterprises adopt technologies such as AI-driven network operations, multicloud networking, zero trust network access (ZTNA), and SD-WAN.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Gabbard decries Britain's reported demand for Apple to provide backdoor access to users' cloud data
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard says she has serious concerns about the British government's reported demand that Apple provide backdoor access to any data stored in the cloud.
item.dc:creator: DAVID KLEPPER, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: F5 targets AI application security with renewed workload management software
item.description: F5 is evolving its core application and load balancing software to help customers secure and manage AI-powered and multicloud workloads.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: The official ChatGPT Android app may have just leaked the GPT-4.5 launch early
item.description: A pop-up alert spotted in ChatGPT for Android suggests preparations are being made for a GPT-4.5 launch.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Vietnam plans energy shift toward building more solar, less reliance on gas and coal
item.description: HANOI, Vietnam (AP) — Vietnam is revising its energy plans to focus more on large solar farms and less on reliance on coal and natural gas. The fast-growing economy now aims to get 16% of its energy from the sun — more than triple its earlier target of just 5%.
item.dc:creator: ANIRUDDHA GHOSAL, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Product-based IT: 6 key steps for making the switch
item.description: Most IT departments are under-resourced and left to debate what capabilities, improvements, and fixes to prioritize.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Nvidia sales surge in the fourth quarter on demand for AI chips
item.description: The stock’s movement carries more weight on the S&P 500 and other indexes than any other company except Apple.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Microsoft’s .NET 10 arrives in first preview
item.description: Microsoft has rolled out the first preview of .NET 10, a major new version of the company’s flagship software development platform. Likely to arrive as a production release in November, .NET 10 introduces C# 14 and adds major enhancements to the .NET runtime, SDK, libraries, ASP.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: NFL NextGen Stats team unveils new tool to help fans better understand combine results
item.description: The NFL scouting combine provides a blizzard of data with hundreds of prospects running through various drills ranging from the 40-yard dash to the vertical jump to a short shuttle.
item.dc:creator: Josh Dubow, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Nvidia sales surge in the fourth quarter on demand for AI chips
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Nvidia on Wednesday reported a surge in fourth-quarter profit and sales as demand for its specialized Blackwell chips, which power artificial intelligence systems, continued to grow, sending the company's stock higher after hours. For the three months that ended Jan.
item.dc:creator: SARAH PARVINI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Hinge’s new feature wants to help trans and neurodivergent daters
item.description: Dating apps are a notoriously hostile space towards transgender users. If they list their transness in their profiles, they’re outing themselves to the world. If they don’t, matches could accuse them of catfishing. Picking the right time to tell matches can feel impossible.
item.dc:creator: Henry Chandonnet, Fast Company

item.title: Man who said he was upset with Musk and Trump charged with threatening to burn down xAI facility
item.description: ASHLAND CITY, Tenn. (AP) — A Tennessee man has been charged with an act of terrorism after he threatened to burn down an xAI facility because he was upset with its founder, Elon Musk, and President Donald Trump, authorities said.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: Meet the AI real estate agent making millions
item.description: Stay up to date on the latest AI technology advancements and learn about the challenges and opportunities AI presents now and for the future.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Federal Prosecutors Announce Arrests in Multi-Million Dollar Investment Scam
item.description: Three individuals were arrested for allegedly operating an unlicensed money transmitting business, netting over $13 million from victims of investment scams tied to 'pig butchering'.
item.dc:creator: Andrea Klick, The Mercury News

item.title: FCC chairman climbs WKRG broadcast tower to highlight, promote industry
item.description: The nation's top communications regulator made a stop in Baldwin County Monday morning and you might be surprised why.
item.dc:creator: Debbie Williams, The Hill

item.title: As Microsoft innovates, Apple stagnates
item.description: Microsoft and Apple were once the yin and yang of the tech world. Microsoft was dull and plodding, milking buggy, barely-good-enough-for-prime-time Windows for tremendous profits, thanks to a worldwide operating system monopoly.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Cot framework aims to ease Rust web development
item.description: Web developers looking for an easier time with the Rust language may want to check out Cot, an emerging web framework pitched as being for “lazy developers.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: 3 strategies for carbon-free data centers
item.description: The construction of massive data center campuses is booming, with hyperscalers, colocation providers and large enterprises developing new capacity to support the exploding requirements of AI.
item.dc:creator: Network World
